event: English aristocratic family portrait with horses
description: An English landscape group portrait showing four figures and animals beneath a large tree. At left, a woman in a white dress and pink skirt sits in a carriage or on a bench, accompanied by an older man. In the center, a young man in a blue coat stands holding the reins of a white horse. At right, another young man sits mounted on a brown horse. A spaniel dog rests in the lower right. The setting is a dark, verdant English parkland with dramatic tree canopy overhead and a distant landscape visible.
